{{Quote|They report few Yuuzhan Vong warriors -- most of the Vong on the ground seem to be members of the intendant class, who help the Peace Brigade run their government.|Kyp Durron|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Ylesia">''[[The New Jedi Order: Ylesia]]''</ref>}}
The '''[[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesian]] Senate''' was the legislative body of the [[Ylesian Republic]], formed out of the sixty former members of the [[Alliance of Twelve]]. It was based in the [[Palace of Peace]] in [[Peace City]].

The amount of authority it actually exercised was unknown, but it was most likely minimal. It was known that all of its members were [[Peace Brigade]]rs. The entire Ylesian senate was captured along with President and Commander-in-Chief [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]] when the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Battle of Ylesia (28 ABY)|attacked]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Ylesia]]''
